_readme: Controls the Order page + the Order box shown on Home. commissionsOpen: true = 'Order on Etsy' buttons; false = 'Join the waitlist'. listingDescription: the paragraph under 'About this piece' — safe to rewrite. howItWorks: the three steps — keep it to three, edit the words freely.
listingDescription: Celebrate your beloved pet with a one-of-a-kind hand-painted acrylic portrait! Each portrait is painted by me with vibrant acrylic paints in my signature expressive style, capturing your pet's unique personality and charm. Whether your furry friend is playful, goofy, serious, or full of attitude, I'll create a custom keepsake you'll treasure for years.

howItWorks.detail: Order on Etsy and message me a clear, well-lit photo of your pet. A few options are welcome.
Each portrait is painted in acrylic on watercolor paper, one at a time, usually within 3-5 days.
Your finished 8×10 portrait ships from Pompano Beach, FL, ready to frame.
